# Copilot Instructions

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a Next.js project for a medical appointment application using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

## Project Guidelines:
- Use TypeScript for all components and pages
- Follow mobile-first responsive design principles with Tailwind CSS
- Use Next.js App Router structure
- Implement clean, accessible UI components
- Follow React best practices with functional components and hooks
- Use semantic HTML for better accessibility

## Styling Guidelines:
- Use Tailwind CSS utility classes
- Implement responsive design with breakpoint prefixes (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:)
- Use consistent color scheme and spacing
- Follow Material Design or modern UI principles for icons and interactions
